articles.title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: analyzing their SSD activity
articles.content: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.
articles.titleZh: 网站有一种监视访问者的新方法：分析他们的SSD活动
articles.contentZh: 可以使用简单的JavaScript在浏览器中测量Telltale SSD活动。

articles.title: Millions of AI agents imperiled by critical vulnerability in open source package
articles.content: "BadHost" was found in Starlette, a package with 325 million weekly downloads.
articles.titleZh: 数以百万计的人工智能代理受到开源软件包中严重漏洞的威胁
articles.contentZh: 在Starlette中找到了“BadHost” ，这是一个每周下载3.25亿次的软件包。

articles.title: US's big bet on quantum computing may not be entirely legal
articles.content: Deal also launched the first quantum foundry company, but is there a need for it?
articles.titleZh: 美国在量子计算上的大赌注可能不完全合法
articles.contentZh: Deal还推出了第一家量子代工公司，但有需要吗？

articles.title: Texas AG sues Meta over claims that WhatsApp doesn't provide end-to-end encryption
articles.content: Critics note a lack of factual support in lawsuit filed by US Senate candidate.
articles.titleZh: Texas AG起诉Meta ，指控WhatsApp不提供端到端加密
articles.contentZh: 批评人士指出，美国参议院候选人提起的诉讼缺乏事实支持。

articles.title: They’ve finally made the Oura Ring smaller and lighter
articles.content: Wherever I go, whatever I do, people point at my finger and ask, "Is that an Oura Ring?" Lots of people find they like the design, and they tell me why they're thinking about switching to a smart ring from a smartwatch. But the people who scrunch up their noses? They usually say something along […]
articles.titleZh: 他们终于让大浦戒指变得更小更轻
articles.contentZh: 无论我走到哪里，无论我做什么，人们都会指着我的手指问： “那是大浦戒指吗？“很多人发现他们喜欢这个设计，他们告诉我他们为什么要考虑从智能手表切换到智能戒指。但是那些挠鼻子的人呢？他们通常会说一些[…]

articles.title: Kia’s flagship EV has a battery problem
articles.content: I first realized there was an issue with Kia's flagship EV9 when I tried to unlock my car last year. The hulking three-row SUV was sitting on my driveway completely dead. The key didn't work, the app connection to the car was gone, and I was already late to an appointment. Luckily, I had prepared […]
articles.titleZh: 起亚的旗舰电动汽车出现电池问题
articles.contentZh: 去年，当我尝试解锁汽车时，我第一次意识到起亚的旗舰车型EV9存在问题。笨重的三排SUV坐在我的车道上完全死了。钥匙不起作用，与汽车的应用程序连接丢失，我已经迟到了预约。幸运的是，我已经准备好了[…]
